title: Nizam Ecosystem Preflight Verdict Schema
description: Validates the machine-readable verdict artifact a clean-state preflight run emits at .agent/reconciliation/<execution-id>/preflight.json, per ecosystem/01_clean_state_preflight.md Sec 6 (Verdict Artifact) and docs/nips/NIP-0001-ecosystem-engineering-cycle.md (Preflight Verdict). Enforces the exact three-verdict enum (PASS, PASS_WITH_EXCEPTIONS, FAIL) and the structured operator-approval state PASS_WITH_EXCEPTIONS requires before execution continues (Sec 5, Operator-Exception Rule).

verdict.description: The preflight run's outcome. Exactly one of the three values; no other value is a valid preflight verdict (protocol Sec 3).

execution_id.description: The ecosystem-cycle execution identifier this preflight run belongs to, matching the <execution-id> path segment of the artifact's own location.

generated_at.description: Date or date-time the preflight run produced this verdict.

exceptions.description: The non-blocking findings surfaced by the run. Populated when verdict is PASS_WITH_EXCEPTIONS (protocol Sec 3); the shape of an individual finding is intentionally open here (additionalProperties true) so it composes with, and does not redefine, schema/engineering_finding.schema.json. Blocking conditions are NEVER recorded here -- they belong in `blocking_findings`.

blocking_findings.description: The blocking findings that produced a FAIL verdict (protocol Sec 4). Required and non-empty when verdict is FAIL; this is the exact shape the shipped CLI (tools/ecosystem_preflight.py) emits on a FAIL run -- each entry a human-readable blocking-condition string. Blocking conditions are recorded here, never inside `exceptions` (which is reserved for non-blocking findings).

operator_approval.description: The structured operator-approval state required whenever verdict is PASS_WITH_EXCEPTIONS (protocol Sec 5, Operator-Exception Rule): the approver's identity, the timestamp of the decision, and either the verbatim authorization text or a reference to it. Recorded in this same verdict artifact, never as a separate, unlinked record.

approver.description: Identity of the operator who reviewed and approved the recorded exceptions.

approved_at.description: Date or date-time the operator recorded the approval decision.

authorization.description: The verbatim operator authorization text, or a reference (e.g. a ticket or PR URL) to where it is recorded.
